title: FIGS Q4 2025 and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
text: FIGS Q4 2025 net revenues reached $201.9 million, 33% YoY increase. Scrubwear net revenues were $154.9 million (35.1% YoY increase). International sales grew 55.1%. Net income margin reached 9.2% in Q4 with net earnings of $18.5 million ($0.10 diluted EPS). Adjusted EBITDA reached $26.7 million (13.2% margin). Gross margin declined 440 basis points from higher tariffs and $5.6 million inventory write-off, partially offset by lower discount rates and favorable freight. Full-year 2025 net revenues reached $631.1 million (13.6% growth). Scrubwear generated $508.9 million (14.3% growth) with non-scrubwear contributing $122.2 million (10.6% growth). Full-year net income was $34.3 million ($0.19 diluted EPS) with 5.4% net margin. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $74.5 million (11.8% margin). Generated $53 million free cash flow. Active customers increased 9.4% to 2.9 million with net revenue per customer rising to $216. Average order value grew 6.2% to $120. 2026 outlook: Net revenue growth 10-12% vs 2025 with adjusted EBITDA margins 12.7-12.9%, anticipating Q1 growth in low-20% range.
